title: Actors and Directors Who Cooperated At Least Three Times
description: Find all (actor_id, director_id) pairs who worked together at least 3 times.
constraints: The same (actor_id, director_id) pair can appear multiple times — no uniqueness on that pair
key_concept: GROUP BY multiple columns + HAVING COUNT >= N.

hints.L1: Group by both actor_id and director_id together. Filter pairs with count >= 3.
hints.L2: SELECT actor_id, director_id FROM ActorDirector GROUP BY actor_id, director_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
hints.L3: SELECT actor_id, director_id FROM ActorDirector GROUP BY actor_id, director_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3

optimal_solution: SELECT actor_id, director_id FROM ActorDirector GROUP BY actor_id, director_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3;
